prompt: Modern law office interior, wide angle view of a spacious conference room with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline at dusk. Warm ambient lighting, walnut conference table, leather chairs, minimal decor. Muted warm tones — charcoal, cream, bronze accents. No people. Architectural interior photography, soft natural light mixing with warm artificial light.

Elegant law firm library or private office, bookshelves lined with legal volumes, a polished dark wood desk with brass lamp, leather chair. Warm afternoon light streaming through tall windows. Rich warm tones — walnut, cream, aged bronze. No people. Editorial interior photography, shallow depth of field on the desk foreground.

Classic New York City stone office building exterior, Art Deco or Beaux-Arts architectural details, shot from street level looking upward. Overcast sky, warm stone facade, brass-framed entrance doors. Muted warm tones. No people. Architectural photography, wide angle, dramatic upward perspective.

Close-up of a polished walnut desk surface with a fountain pen resting on an open leather portfolio, brass desk lamp casting warm light. Legal documents partially visible, out of focus. No people. Still life photography, warm tones, shallow depth of field, editorial style.

Professional headshot of a distinguished man in his late 50s wearing a charcoal suit and bronze-gold tie. Neutral warm gray background. Confident, approachable expression. Corporate portrait photography, soft studio lighting, clean and sharp.

Professional headshot of a woman in her early 40s wearing a dark navy blazer and cream blouse. Neutral warm gray background. Poised, intelligent expression. Corporate portrait photography, soft studio lighting, clean and sharp.

Professional headshot of a man in his mid 30s wearing a dark suit and light blue shirt, no tie. Neutral warm gray background. Friendly, determined expression. Corporate portrait photography, soft studio lighting, clean and sharp.

Overhead view of a conference table during a business meeting — documents, folders, coffee cups, and a laptop arranged neatly on a dark wood surface. Hands of two people visible reviewing papers. Warm tones, natural light from a nearby window. Business documentary photography, top-down perspective.

Close-up of elegant legal documents with a gold seal and ribbon on cream paper, resting on a dark leather desk blotter. A vintage brass pen holder nearby. Warm, intimate lighting. No people. Still life photography, warm tones, shallow depth of field.

Aerial view of a city block with brownstone townhouses and tree-lined streets, autumn foliage in warm gold and amber tones. Clear day, long shadows. No people visible. Urban landscape photography, drone perspective, warm afternoon light.

A peaceful park bench under a large oak tree with dappled sunlight filtering through leaves. Warm autumn tones, soft focus background of a green lawn. No people. Landscape photography, warm and contemplative mood, golden hour light.

Modern office building lobby with polished stone floors, clean lines, and warm lighting. Glass doors leading to an elevator bank. Minimalist corporate aesthetic, warm neutral tones. No people. Architectural interior photography, wide angle.

Close-up of a judge's gavel resting on a polished wooden sound block, warm side lighting creating dramatic shadows. Rich wood tones, dark background. No people. Legal still life photography, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field.

Modern glass and steel commercial building exterior at golden hour, reflections of clouds in the windows. Warm tones, dramatic sky. No people. Commercial architecture photography, wide angle, golden light.

Stack of legal briefs and case files on a desk, neatly organized with color-coded tabs, a pair of reading glasses resting on top. Warm office lighting. No people. Documentary still life photography, warm tones.

Handshake between two business professionals over a conference table, shot from the side showing only hands and forearms in tailored suit sleeves. Documents on the table. Warm natural light. Business photography, close-up, warm tones.
Row of brownstone buildings on a quiet residential street, iron railings and stone steps, mature trees. Warm overcast light, muted earth tones. No people. Urban residential photography, medium shot.

A contract document being signed with a luxury pen, close-up on the signature line with elegant letterhead visible. Dark wood desk surface, brass desk accessories. Warm directional lighting. Documentary photography, shallow depth of field.

Modern courtroom interior with empty wooden benches, judge's elevated desk, and American flag. Dignified, institutional. Warm wood tones, natural light from high windows. No people. Architectural interior photography.

Casual portrait of a man in his mid 50s with a friendly expression, wearing a dark polo shirt. Soft natural background, blurred greenery. Warm, trustworthy. Lifestyle portrait photography, natural light.
